violations.description: General employee practices. — --Employee failed to maintain a high degree of personal cleanliness or observe proper hygienic practices. -Use handwash sink only and dry hands with paper towels...no cloth on waist band.

General food protection. — --Food item was not protected from potential contamination. -Spray bottle being used for spraying marinade on meat was not made of food grade material. Need to get a food safe sprayer.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Sanitizer bucket needs set up at start of shift. Do not use hand towels on waist band of apron.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not designed and/or maintained properly. -Cover open spot on hood filters.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. -Blocked by supplies.
